sub_groupings.name: Neurodevelopmental and Genetic Syndromes
sub_groupings.description: Conditions involving developmental delays, intellectual disabilities, and genetic syndromes

sub_groupings.name: Musculoskeletal and Connective Tissue Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Skeletal dysplasias, osteochondrodysplasias, and connective tissue abnormalities

sub_groupings.name: Endocrine and Metabolic Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions affecting hormone regulation and metabolic pathways

sub_groupings.name: Neurological and Myopathic Conditions
sub_groupings.description: Neuromuscular disorders including myopathies and mitochondrial diseases

sub_groupings.name: Ophthalmologic and Craniofacial Anomalies
sub_groupings.description: Eye abnormalities and facial developmental defects

sub_groupings.name: Renal and Urogenital Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Kidney developmental defects and urogenital system abnormalities

sub_groupings.name: Cardiovascular and Circulatory Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Heart defects and circulatory system abnormalities

sub_groupings.name: Hematologic and Blood Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Blood-related conditions including coagulation defects and anemias

sub_groupings.name: Sensory and Neurosensory Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions affecting sensory organs and neural pathways

sub_groupings.name: Other Congenital & Genetic disorders
sub_groupings.description: Miscellaneous congenital and genetic conditions not fitting other categories
